name: Even Spartan yearn for connection.
description:
Behold, Linda-058 or just Linda from Halo.(Brought to mostly by Tarnished user but FLRY653 decided to comment his suggestion on his own massage, meaning I couldn’t see it. But I did eventually.)

For POV anything works, expect for the Banished because fuck them and I don’t like them for some reason.

Original artist is spl4ts and here’s the link to the image.
creator: Twinsx2
